text.title: Tool Deprecation Lifecycle Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Tool Deprecation Lifecycle output. Subagent must satisfy this contract before returning to caller.

required.field: the actual answer / chosen option / value produced
at least 2 sentences; cites at least one input artefact by name
list of input names with source paths or URLs

forbidden.pattern: rationale that does not reference any input by name
inputs_used empty AND decision is not 'no-op'
duplicate artefact_id within the same store

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim rationale to no more than 500 chars, preserving numeric claims and named tools.
Promote 'no decision yet' to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.
Group near-duplicate inputs, recording the group with member count.

output-contract.example: { "artefact_id": "tdep-example-001", "owner": "alex@acme.com", "decision": "see templates/tool-deprecation-lifecycle.md for shape", "rationale": "Decision cites input artefact A (URL) and input artefact B (path). The rationale is at least two sentences and identifies which constraints drove the call.", "inputs_used": [{"name": "A", "source": "https://example.com/A"}, {"name": "B", "source": "repo:path/B"}], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-22" }

list.item: Every required field populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
